name: testWaitScopePerformSerialBitAnalysis
title: testWaitScopePerformSerialBitAnalysis
syntax: long testWaitScopePerformSerialBitAnalysis (linframe aMessage, dword flags, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, ScopeBitMaskPolygon bitMaskPolygon, long domVoltageThreshold , long recVoltageThreshold, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle);
description: Checks the bits of a LIN message against the defined bit mask.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: The LIN message to be analyzed.

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: The start and end of the cutout to be fitted. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin.

parameters.name: maskPointCount
parameters.type: Count of the points in the mask-arrays

parameters.name: data_0_Mask
parameters.type: Voltage level in mV for dominant bits

parameters.name: data_1_Mask
parameters.type: Voltage level in mV for recessive bits

parameters.name: timeOffset
parameters.type: Relative position within bit in percent

parameters.name: domVoltageThreshold, recVoltageThreshold
parameters.description: The voltage levels in millivolt used from the bit parser for detecting dominant and recessive bits.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
